---
title: "Publications"
---

::: {.content}

::: {.card}
## DNA methylation and machine learning: challenges and perspective toward enhanced clinical diagnostics
**Journal:** Clinical Epigenetics – Springer Nature<br>
**Date:** October 10, 2025
[View Publication →](https://link.springer.com/article/10.1186/s13148-025-01967-0)
:::

::: {.card}
## CCND1 Overexpression in Idiopathic Dilated Cardiomyopathy: A Promising Biomarker?
**Journal:** Genes – MDPI  
**Date:** June 10, 2023
[View Publication →](https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4425/14/6/1243)
:::

::: {.card}
## Correlation of NTRK1 Downregulation with Low Levels of Tumor-Infiltrating Immune Cells and Poor Prognosis of Prostate Cancer Revealed by Gene Network Analysis
**Journal:** Genes – MDPI  
**Date:** May 8, 2022
[View Publication →](https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4425/13/5/840)
:::

::: {.card}
## Targeting Protein Kinases and Epigenetic Control as Combinatorial Therapy Options for Advanced Prostate Cancer Treatment
**Journal:** Pharmaceutics – MDPI  
**Date:** Feb 25, 2022
[View Publication →](https://www.mdpi.com/1999-4923/14/3/515)
:::

<button class="theme-toggle" onclick="toggleTheme()">
  {{< fa sun >}}
  {{< fa moon >}}
</button>

<script>
function toggleTheme() {
  document.body.classList.toggle('dark-mode');
}
</script>
:::
